title: Carry-On Packing List ✈️ Don’t Forget These Essentials
description:
Don’t rely on memory at the airport 😅
Save this carry-on checklist so you never forget the essentials again.
✔ Documents & boarding pass
✔ Phone, charger & power bank
✔ Snacks & empty bottle
✔ Toiletries & medications
✔ Extra clothes (just in case)
Because forgetting small things = big stress during your flight ✈️
👉 Save this before your next trip
